summary: Hard cutover from legacy workflow_tasks to Approval Graph for timesheet approvals.

notes: Migrates legacy workflow_tasks rows into approval_nodes and approval_node_assignees.
Verifies pending, reviewed, project-block, and department-summary counts before dropping workflow_tasks.
Replaces psa_timesheet_action so submit, approve, reject, and reopen operate only on Approval Graph.
Keeps workflow_tasks only as migration input and drops it in the same transaction after checks pass.
Approval center reads approval_pending_tasks_view and approval_reviewed_timesheets_view only.
Timesheet detail and edit locking use Approval Graph project review records only.
Realtime subscriptions moved from workflow_tasks to Approval Graph tables.

verification: Apply migration 042 on cloud after PostgreSQL backup.
Check approval_graph_cutover_audit for old/migrated count equality and workflow_tasks_dropped=true.
